column_distance.description: Column Distance. Symbol: L. Units: m. Distance between columns

story_height.description: Story Height. Symbol: hsx. Units: m. Height of each story in the building

beam_depth.description: Beam Depth. Symbol: db. Units: mm. Depth of the beam

column_width.description: Column Width. Symbol: wcol. Units: mm. Width of the column

part_one_length.description: Part 1 Length. Symbol: L1. Units: mm. The length of Part 1 of the buckling-restrained brace

part_two_length.description: Part 2 Length. Symbol: L2. Units: mm. The length of Part 2 of the buckling-restrained brace

core_end_width.description: Core End Width. Symbol: W1. Units: mm. Width of the core plate at the ends

rib_width.description: Rib Width. Symbol: W2. Units: mm. Width of the rib used in the brace

rib_thickness.description: Rib Thickness. Symbol: tr. Units: mm. Thickness of the rib used in the brace

core_plate_width.description: Core Plate Width. Symbol: bc. Units: mm. Width of the core plate of the brace

core_plate_thickness.description: Core Plate Thickness. Symbol: tc. Units: mm. Thickness of the core plate

splice_plate_length.description: Length of Splice Plate. Symbol: Ls. Units: mm. Length of the splice plate connecting the brace parts

max_plastic_length.description: Max Plastic Length. Symbol: Lpmax. Units: mm. Maximum plastic length for the core yielding region

max_brace_length.description: Max Brace Length. Symbol: LBmax. Units: mm. Maximum allowable brace length

axial_capacity.description: Axial Capacity. Symbol: Pgmax. Units: kN. Maximum axial capacity of the brace

modulus_of_elasticity.description: Modulus of Elasticity. Symbol: E. Units: GPa. Modulus of elasticity of the material used

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
